title: Why Do You Wield That Sword?
overview: Young swordsman Roan and his comrade Yufa face a spreading darkness after meeting a blindfolded mage.

title: Be Good to Me, Big Brother
overview: Roan and Yufa look for the Golden Thief Bug and a girl named Maya threatens to hinder their progress.

title: I Believe
overview: Roan and his band join forces with Takius as they journey into the pits and haunted dungeons beneath Geffen Tower.

title: Is That the Best You Can Do?
overview: Roan, Yufa, Maya and Takius return to the dungeons of Geffen Tower to defeat the evil that plagues the tower.

title: What Did You Just Say?
overview: A shocking revelation turns Yufa's world upside down and tensions begin to mount.

title: I Won't Let Anyone Get in My Way!
overview: Yufa sets out for a reunion after hearing that her brother may still be alive.

title: Will You Comfort Me?!?
overview: Roan and his comrades journey to Alberta to investigate a monster infestation.

title: Life Is Precious
overview: The travelers take a shortcut through the notorious Labyrinth Forest, only to talk in circles.

title: All for the Truth
overview: Takius convinces the travelers to make a detour to an underground lair inhabited by enormous ants.

title: You're My Brother, Aren't You?!?
overview: Roan and friends reach the city of Morroc, home of the Thief's Guild.

title: All Is Only Despair
overview: Rai is tricked into opening the tomb of King Osiris, unleashing a horde of ghastly monsters.

title: I Can't Do It
overview: Following the battle with Osiris, the group heads toward the Assassin's guild; Yufa struggles with her brother's death.

title: The Protector
overview: Roan must join forces with adversaries to protect Yufa.

title: Why Won't You Answer?
overview: The clock tower's bell begins to ring, summoning lethal monsters.

title: Don't Worry, I'm Here
overview: Roan returns from his mission with new skills and the rank of a fully-ordained Crusader.

title: I Can't Save Anyone
overview: Roan and his group travel to the ancient city of Payon to stop a outbreak of violent and destructive monsters.

title: You Are Already Tainted
overview: While Roan and a group of Archers attempt to hold off the monsters, Takius's master makes his presence known; Yufa prepares herself for challenges that could earn her the title of Priest.

title: I've Known All Along
overview: Roan may have uncovered the key to stopping the monsters; Yufa rejoins her friends as a newly-appointed Priest.

title: We'll Always Be Together
overview: Missing the ferry to the Parol Lighthouse turns out to be more than just bad luck.

title: It's Okay
overview: Maya is devastated over her role in what happened to Alice; Yufa continues her battle with Haze.

title: I Need You
overview: Haze and Zealotus continue to spread darkness throughout the realm; Roan crosses paths with the Dark Lord's emissaries of destruction.

title: Who's the Lonely One?
overview: The group finally reaches Comodo, where they encounter familiar rivals; Iruga vows to save Keough; Comodo must be snatched from the clutches of a deadly scourge.

title: Good Bye
overview: Comodo is under siege while Roan, Iruga, and Judia fight to stave off the onslaught of an army of monsters.

title: Place of Reckoning
overview: Roan's group travels to Glast Heim in search of Yufa and her dangerous brother Haze.

title: One Who Realizes His Mistake
overview: Roan watches Yufa suffer at the hands of Haze; Takius and Zephyr finally meet on the field of battle.

title: For the Sake of Our Future
overview: The Dark Lord's return is imminent, and Roan will have to use every skill to overcome this hideous force of evil.
